violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. - No ServeSafe person on staff.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. - Yogurt refrigerator temp is 42.8

Hot storage of potentially hazardous food. — --Hot food storage facilities/equipment * was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining temperature of potentially hazardous food at 140F or greater. - Sausage Hot hold 108*F - Gravy Hot Hold 112*F

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - cabinets and counters by the sink in need of repair. Laminate covers are missing, exposing particle wood underneath.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - black bacterial growth around the sink area.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. - wall by sink needs repaired.
